commands.review_summary:
The PR adds channel-turn diagnostic trace scopes, harness/run trace propagation, OTel message-span tracking from dispatch start, and regression tests for channel diagnostics waterfalls.

PR surface: Source +239, Tests +556. Total +795 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main lacks a channel message trace scope and creates the OTel message span only at completion, matching the linked Slack/Tempo report. I did not run a live Slack/Tempo setup in this read-only review.
